# Example 23andMe-style raw genome (synthetic — for testing import_dna.py).
# Format: rsid <tab> chromosome <tab> position <tab> genotype
# Try it:  python3 import_dna.py example_genome.txt && python3 viewer.py
rs429358	19	44908684	CT
rs7412	19	44908822	CC
rs2802292	6	108587315	GT
rs1801133	1	11856378	CT
rs1801131	1	11854476	GT
